description: Per-benchmark score baselines. Bump after an intentional, validated methodology change.

per_case_v050.case-002: 3 findings emitted; 1 matches expected + 2 unmatched (over-reporting regression)
per_case_v050.case-003: 1 HIGH missing_input_validation — matches expected (recovered from v0.4.3 miss via Gate B)
per_case_v050.case-005: 2 expected matched + 1 unmatched (stale_state_read FP on claimRewards)
per_case_v050.case-006: 1 CRITICAL sig replay matches + 2 unmatched (auxiliary findings)
per_case_v050.case-008: CLEAN CASE — 2 FPs on fee accounting (RC-AGENT, plausible but not real)
per_case_v050.case-009: CLEAN CASE — 1 FP on stale multisig approvals (RC-AGENT)
per_case_v050.case-011: CLEAN CASE — 2 FPs (MEDIUM + LOW, downgraded from v0.4.3 HIGH)

known_ceilings.rationale: Remaining ~20% of points require flow-level analysis (fee accounting, multisig approval tracking, cross-window merkle replay) that pattern matching structurally cannot prove without PoC execution. Pushing past 0.80 requires adding a verification layer which is out of scope for drozer-lite.
